untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of: (1) initial profit target zone (not a standard indicator), (2) previous pivot points/swing highs/lows (requires swing detection logic not available), (3) momentum confirmation at target (undefined metric), (4) specific buffer distances from pivots (THRESHOLD_NEEDED values not provided). The core pattern—pullback trade failure near profit targets—cannot be fully operationalized without swing point detection and explicit profit target placement parameters.
translation_notes: Partial translation provided: Entry uses trend confirmation (ADX > 25) and price relative to SMA_20 to detect pullback setup in trending regimes. Exit conditions reference pivot levels (s1/r1) as proxy for prior swing points, but the signal's emphasis on 'third pullback failure' and momentum-based exits at target zones requires manual threshold calibration and swing point detection not available in the allowed indicator set. Recommend: (1) define buffer_from_pivot_pips and exit_proximity_distance as backtester parameters, (2) implement swing point detection separately, (3) calibrate profit target zone offset from recent swing highs/lows.
